summary: The user sought fashion advice on styling a new pair of high-waisted, dark blue Levi's jeans and considered pairing them with Adidas sneakers. They decided to try a white fitted top and denim jacket for a put-together look, aiming to invest in a quality denim jacket priced around $100-$200.
facts: The user recently purchased a pair of high-waisted, dark blue jeans from Levi's for $80. The user also bought a pair of Adidas sneakers for $50. The user plans to pair their denim jacket with a white fitted top and dark blue jeans. The user intends to add patterned socks and a simple necklace to their outfit. The user has had good experiences with Levi's in the past. The user is trying to invest in more timeless pieces for their wardrobe. The user is willing to spend around $100-$200 on a good quality denim jacket.
